name: hsr-optimizer
description: Honkai: Star Rail Build Optimizer & Battle Simulator

scripts.data:seed: wrangler d1 execute hsr-optimizer --local --file=src/data/generated/characters.sql && wrangler d1 execute hsr-optimizer --local --file=src/data/generated/light_cones.sql && wrangler d1 execute hsr-optimizer --local --file=src/data/generated/relic_sets.sql
scripts.data:seed:remote: wrangler d1 execute hsr-optimizer --remote --file=src/data/generated/characters.sql && wrangler d1 execute hsr-optimizer --remote --file=src/data/generated/light_cones.sql && wrangler d1 execute hsr-optimizer --remote --file=src/data/generated/relic_sets.sql
